title: Field vs Field
note: catch field and catch field row are the same thing. we're trying to create one icon plus title plus body text plus action primitive for the whole app. each of these fields is optional and the catch field widget as its currently implemented has many issues.

title: Field input mode consolidation
note: again, they're the same. the only difference ought to be whether the widget has a section wrapper around it or not

title: FieldGroup vs FieldGroup
note: same, the only difference is whether we group multiple sections with delimiter horizontal hairlines or in rounded rectangle section widgets

title: TopBar vs CatchTopBar.identity
note: merge them, make the chat top bar a variant of the catch top bar, but profile navigation disabled shouldnt even be a variant. what does that even mean?

title: Metric rail consolidation
note: but styling should be like catch metric strip on left

title: TopBar vs ClubHeroAppBar
note: clubheroapp bar and top bar are different concepts. eventheroapp bar and the featured event explore section are also all different concepts. but you can bring some kind of streamlining to their naming conventions

title: Surface vs Callout
note: callout, section, surface, panel, softband are all the same concept. they need to be unified and made configurable, similar to the field tasks

title: CatchSectionStack: catalog vs contract
note: section stack needs to be merged and in fact a lot of these primitives are straight up incorrect. ask me for input when you're working on it and we'll fix it together

title: SearchField vs ExpandingSearch
note: merge but theres a ton of issues. the expansion of the button should be animated, and also right now theres a different background color around what i assume is the nested textfield inside the expanded search bar. we should also have a expanding and always expanded search bar option

title: PersonAvatar vs PersonAvatarStack
note: but the avatar stack should not reimplement the avatar, it should only offer ways to compose multiple of them

title: PersonAvatar vs PersonAvatarStack
note: but the avatar stack should not reimplement the avatar, it should only offer ways to compose multiple of them

title: ActivityAvatar vs PersonAvatar
note: can you clarify when we use catch activity avatar, these should all be variations of person avatar, if we need them at all

title: SettingsRow vs Field
note: setting row should be a field variant. fully merge might require creating one more single line field variation

title: SegmentedControl vs OptionGroup
note: separate concepts but ill have a look and refine these a bit more, they're not completely right

title: Analytics panel family
note: the report view should be composed host analytics sections

title: Badge and status family
note: we should probably rename at least one of the two to avoid confusion. one is to indicate facts about some entity. the other is to show a notification or some other count

title: Bottom chrome family
note: the dock is a section of a specific type on a screen. the cta is one out of a couple of possible widgets that goes into the dock

title: Browse header family
note: im going to assume catchbrowse header isnt used anywhere anymore, and is a remainder of our earlier clubs screen. if there is anything in that that seems useful merge it into the widget on the right otherwise you may discard it completely

title: Horizontal rail family
note: i think dashboard rail doesnt need to be an independent concept. we should have one catchhorizontalrail widget thats configurable

title: Picker family
note: both of these concepts are deprecated. ask me for specifics if you dont know how to deal with this. delete both

title: Pill and chip family
note: should just be one chip with more config options

title: Reveal and rotation family
note: merge into one, both seem identical from what i can tell

title: Review family
note: review section should be composed of review cards

title: BrowseHeader vs feature browse headers
note: catch browse header should be removed. i dont believe it is used anywhere anymore

title: DetailRow vs Field
note: both should be replaced by catchField variants

title: SelectChip vs OptionCard
note: in the wizards, we've moved to catchOptionCards. if there's still a place where we're using catchSelectChip other than the wizards, it should probably be merged with catchChip

title: Search and filter family
note: explore search field should just be an instance of a catchSearchfield

title: Person row family
note: one is a notification, the other is a chatListTile

title: Inline field editor family
note:
profile info fields should be replaced by the correct type of catch fields. and i cant see the preview for the 
widget on the right

title: Hero app bar family
note: these are the custom app bars for two different things

title: Event card and event row family
note: are we still using the one on the left anywhere? this is legacy UI, okay to remove

title: Bottom chrome boundary
note: why does catch bottom cta need to be a different widget that a pill button or catch button or whatever our button primitive is? catch bottom dock, meanwhile is a place for the button as well as ocassionally some other info to be composed, so they're distinct concepts

title: Person row boundary
note: chat list tile and chat person row are the same thing. chat person avatar is something else, though we might use it in the chat list tile and chat person avatar stack is a way to compose multiple person avatars, so its also something distinct

title: Event visual/card/media boundary
note: all images in this app have a grading applied to them for a signature look and feel (catchgradedimage/catchgrade). catch event thumbnail is either the event image (if uploaded) + image grade (always on by default) or a event color + symbol + line art to visually represent that  activity type. catcheventticketcard and catcheventspotlightcard are variations of the event ticket metaphor and can be merged into the same concern. i dont know what catch detail hero backdrop is but based on the preview it seems like it ought to be a state and not a distinct concept. i also dont know what catch viewport curve frame is. some of these concepts are obsolete but lets consolidate into a smaller number of widgets logically grouped first and then winnow down the states

title: Chat header private pieces
note: we should merge all these concepts into one configurable topbar concept

title: CatchField: variant surface cleanup
note: Resolved the input/non-input split by keeping one CatchField implementation behind explicit named constructors, renaming text-entry states from input-* to edit-*, and moving grouped focus/error chrome to CatchSection contained surfaces.
